sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Piper Sandler upgrades Biogen stock rating on acquisition strength
feed.summary: Piper Sandler upgraded Biogen Inc. to 'Overweight' from its previous rating and increased its price target to $214 from $177. This upgrade reflects improved growth prospects for Biogen following its acquisition of assets from Apellis Pharmaceuticals, which enhances its drug portfolio with key treatments like Empaveli and Syfovre. These new additions are expected to offset revenue declines from older multiple sclerosis treatments as they face loss of exclusivity later this decade, contributing to projected revenue growth to over $10.5 billion by 2027.

feed.title: Weyerhaeuser Co stock (US9831341071): Why timber supply dynamics matter more now for investors
feed.summary: This article examines Weyerhaeuser Co (WY) stock, highlighting its resilience in volatile markets due to its vast timberlands and REIT structure. It emphasizes how the company's dual segments, Timberlands and Real Estate, provide steady returns, and its sustainable forestry practices offer a hedge against inflation. The report advises investors to monitor lumber market trends, real estate developments, and wood's increasing role in decarbonization.

feed.title: Honeywell Secures Contract for NextDecade's LNG Project
feed.summary: Honeywell International Inc. has secured a significant contract with Bechtel Energy to supply liquefaction technology and equipment for NextDecade's Rio Grande LNG project in Texas. This agreement will add two new production lines, increasing the project's liquefaction capacity. Despite this growth, Honeywell stock (HON) is currently considered overvalued by GuruFocus, with a GF Value™ of $218.75 against a current price of $233.45.

feed.title: Emerson Electric Co stock (US2910111044): Why its automation focus is suddenly worth a closer look
feed.summary: Emerson Electric Co. is highlighted as a reliable industrial automation stock, offering steady dividends and focusing on high-growth areas like AspenTech integration. Its strategy, which includes a strong emphasis on automation solutions and AI-driven asset optimization, positions it for consistent gains even amidst economic shifts. The company's resilient verticals, recurring revenue from software, and disciplined capital allocation make it an attractive option for income-focused investors seeking growth with lower volatility.

feed.title: Dow names former packaging leader as CEO
feed.summary: Dow has appointed Karen Carter, its current Chief Operating Officer and former head of packaging and specialty plastics, as its new CEO, effective July 1. She will succeed Jim Fitterling, who will become executive chair of the board. Carter's appointment follows a period where she led value growth in Dow's largest revenue unit and oversaw crucial innovation projects related to sustainable plastics.

feed.title: Gerdau SA (ADR) stock (BRGGBRACNPR7): Why steel market cycles matter more now for investors
feed.summary: Gerdau SA, a major Brazilian steel producer, is significantly impacted by volatile global steel market cycles, which are influenced by construction, infrastructure, automotive, and manufacturing demand. Investors need to monitor these dynamics, along with Gerdau's diverse geographic footprint and financial health, to assess its stock potential. Key factors like post-pandemic recovery, inflation, geopolitical tensions, and supply chain disruptions make understanding these cycles more critical for investing in Gerdau's ADRs.

feed.title: PulteGroup Inc. stock (US7458671010): Is housing demand strong enough to drive sustained gains?
feed.summary: PulteGroup Inc. is strategically positioned to capitalize on pent-up housing demand in a market with low affordability and high mortgage rates, leveraging its focus on entry-level and move-up buyers. The company's multi-brand strategy, vertical integration, and disciplined land management contribute to its competitive advantage. Despite risks from interest rates and economic slowdowns, analysts view PulteGroup favorably due to its strong balance sheet, market position, and capital allocation strategies.

feed.title: Up the ranks: Tapaswee Chandele named Global CPO at The Coca-Cola Company, succeeding Lisa Chang
feed.summary: Tapaswee Chandele has been appointed as the Global Chief People Officer at The Coca-Cola Company, succeeding Lisa Chang, effective May 1, 2026. Chandele, a Coca-Cola veteran since 2001, previously served in various HR leadership roles and will now report to CEO Henrique Braun. Lisa Chang, who served seven years in the role, will remain with the company as a senior advisor through the end of 2026.

feed.title: The Travelers Companies, Inc. stock (US89417E1091): Why property-casualty resilience now matters mor
feed.summary: The Travelers Companies, Inc. (TRV) provides a compelling investment case due to its strength in property-casualty insurance, disciplined underwriting, and consistent dividend payments. The company's diversified portfolio, strategic growth initiatives including technological innovation, and robust capital allocation demonstrate its resilience in a volatile market. Travelers is positioned as a reliable player in the insurance sector, offering stability and growth potential for both U.S. and global investors.

feed.title: Huntington National Bank Designated Official Consumer Bank at University of Michigan
feed.summary: Huntington National Bank has been designated as the Official Consumer Bank of the University of Michigan, an exclusive deal solidifying the bank's presence in the state. This partnership grants students, faculty, and staff access to special banking benefits, financial education, co-branded debit cards, and mortgage closing discounts. Huntington is also investing in financial literacy programs, career initiatives, and $250,000 in scholarships and student organization sponsorships at the university.

feed.title: LKQ Corp stock (US5362531003): Why does its auto parts recycling edge matter more now for U.S. inves
feed.summary: LKQ Corp (US5362531003) is highlighted as a resilient investment due to its dominance in the recycled auto parts market, catering to steady U.S. repair demand amidst rising vehicle costs and an aging car fleet. The company's vertically integrated model, focusing on vehicle dismantling, reconditioning, and optimized logistics, insulates it from new part price volatility and generates reliable revenue streams. This positions LKQ as a defensive play, particularly attractive to U.S. and English-speaking market investors seeking stability and sustainability in consumer cyclical sectors.

feed.title: RTX Contracts For MV-75 And Patriot Shift Focus To Long-Term Value
feed.summary: RTX, through its businesses Collins Aerospace and Raytheon, has secured significant contracts for the U.S. Army's MV-75 Future Long Range Assault Aircraft and Patriot GEM-T interceptors for Ukraine. These agreements, coupled with the opening of a new Patriot production facility in Germany, underscore RTX's pivotal role in global defense and its alignment with U.S. modernization and allied defense requirements. Investors should view these developments as indicators of long-term contract visibility, although Simply Wall St notes minor risks such as high debt levels and recent insider selling.

feed.title: BofA Securities Adjusts MetLife Price Target to $99 From $103, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: BofA Securities has revised its price target for MetLife (MET) to $99, down from $103, while reaffirming its "Buy" rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other analyst actions on MetLife, with various firms maintaining "Buy," "Outperform," or "Overweight" ratings despite some recent price target reductions. The article also provides a brief company profile for MetLife, outlining its business segments in life, accident, and health insurance.

feed.title: Medtronic plc stock (IE00BTN1Y115): Why its medtech leadership position matters more now for investo
feed.summary: Medtronic plc, a global leader in medical technology, offers investors exposure to healthcare innovation and demographic trends with its diversified portfolio across cardiovascular, medical surgical, neuroscience, and diabetes segments. The company demonstrates financial resilience with over $30 billion in annual revenue, strong free cash flow, and a consistent dividend growth record, positioning it well to capitalize on projected healthcare spending increases. Despite facing regulatory hurdles and intense competition, Medtronic's significant R&D investment and strategic acquisitions reinforce its competitive moat and long-term potential for shareholders.

feed.title: Disney to eliminate 1,000 positions
feed.summary: Walt Disney's new chief executive, Josh D'Amaro, has announced plans to lay off approximately 1,000 employees as part of an effort to streamline the company's operations. The cuts will affect various departments, including marketing, studio and television, ESPN, products and technology, and certain corporate functions. This action comes as Disney, like other Hollywood studios, adjusts to changing economic realities such as a decline in the television business and increased competition, following a previous round of 7,000 job cuts in 2023.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Utilities Companies: Nisource (NI) and Constellation Energy Corporation (CEG)
feed.summary: Two utilities companies, Nisource (NI) and Constellation Energy Corporation (CEG), have received bullish sentiments from analysts. Argus Research maintained a Buy rating on Nisource with a $52 price target, while BMO Capital reiterated a Buy rating on Constellation Energy Corporation with a $386 price target. Both companies have a Strong Buy consensus rating from analysts, indicating positive outlooks for their stocks.

feed.title: State of Cruise Industry 2026: Record Demand Despite Temporary Challenges
feed.summary: Leaders from Carnival Corporation, Royal Caribbean Group, Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings, and MSC Group's Cruise Division gathered to discuss the state of the cruise industry in 2026. Despite challenges like rising fuel prices and geopolitical volatility, the industry is experiencing record demand, adapting with technology, and maintaining a "value gap" compared to other vacation options. Executives also addressed sustainability, the role of AI, and collaborating with local authorities to manage "overtourism."

feed.title: QUALCOMM Incorporated stock (US7475251036): Is AI chip dominance strong enough to unlock new upside?
feed.summary: QUALCOMM's AI-enabled Snapdragon processors are central to mobile and edge computing expansion, but the firm faces significant competition. The article explores whether QUALCOMM's technology leadership can translate into sustained profitability and stock gains for investors, highlighting its dual business model of high-margin licensing and fabless chip design. It also examines the company's competitive advantages in intellectual property and ecosystem integration, alongside risks such as intensifying competition and geopolitical tensions.

feed.title: PepsiCo Looks to Have Solid Q1, Retain Current Fiscal 2026 Guidance, RBC Says
feed.summary: RBC anticipates that PepsiCo (PEP) will report solid first-quarter results and maintain its fiscal 2026 guidance. This outlook comes as the company faces ongoing pressure to demonstrate the effectiveness of its turnaround strategy, which was initiated following activist investor Elliott Management's stake. Investors are keen to see if PepsiCo can sustain its performance amidst market expectations.

feed.title: International Business Machines Likely to Post Q1 Beat, Morgan Stanley Says
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley predicts that International Business Machines (IBM) is likely to exceed its Q1 earnings expectations. The article also briefly mentions Unity Software's Q4 financial results, reporting revenue of $609 million and a loss of 66 cents per share, surpassing consensus estimates for revenue.

feed.title: Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. stock (US0079031078): Is AI infrastructure demand strong enough to sustain its competitive edge?
feed.summary: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) is a key player in the AI revolution, providing essential semiconductors for data centers, yet faces intense competition from Nvidia. The article discusses AMD's core business in high-performance computing, its strategic focus on AI and data centers, and the challenges it faces in the competitive landscape. It also considers the opportunities for U.S. and English-speaking investors and highlights risks such as Nvidia's dominance and potential price wars.

feed.title: Exxon Mobil Corp Stock (XOM) Moved Down by 3.24% on Apr 14: What Investors Need To Know
feed.summary: Exxon Mobil Corp (XOM) stock declined by 3.24% on April 14th, primarily due to falling crude oil prices driven by renewed optimism for peace talks between the U.S. and Iran. The company also faces internal challenges, including a projected 6% reduction in Q1 2026 global oil-equivalent production and significant estimated earnings impacts from Middle East disruptions. Analysts hold mixed views on XOM's short-term performance amidst market volatility and geopolitical developments.

feed.title: Chevron Corp Stock (CVX) Moved Down by 3.15% on Apr 14: A Full Analysis
feed.summary: Chevron Corp (CVX) stock decreased by 3.15% on April 14, influenced primarily by falling crude oil prices due to potential diplomatic talks between the US and Iran and Q1 2026 financial headwinds. The company anticipates negative timing effects and a working capital outflow for Q1 2026, alongside a modest production reduction. Despite these short-term pressures, analysts generally maintain positive longer-term ratings for Chevron.

feed.title: BOSTON SCIENTIFIC CORPORATION (BSX) DEADLINE ALERT Bernstein Liebhard LLP Reminds Boston Scientific Corporation Investors of Upcoming Deadline
feed.summary: Bernstein Liebhard LLP has issued a deadline alert reminding Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE: BSX) investors of an upcoming deadline in a securities fraud class action lawsuit. Investors who purchased shares between July 23, 2025, and February 3, 2026, and suffered losses are encouraged to contact the firm by May 4, 2026, to discuss their rights or to serve as lead plaintiff. The lawsuit alleges that Boston Scientific made misrepresentations regarding its U.S. electrophysiology segment.

feed.title: GEMINI SPACE STATION, INC. (GEMI) DEADLINE ALERT Bernstein Liebhard LLP Reminds Gemini Space Station, Inc. Investors of Upcoming Deadline
feed.summary: Bernstein Liebhard LLP is reminding investors of Gemini Space Station, Inc. (NASDAQ: GEMI) about an upcoming deadline for a securities fraud class action lawsuit. Investors who purchased Gemini securities between September 12, 2025, and February 17, 2026, and suffered losses, are encouraged to contact the firm to discuss their legal rights. The lawsuit alleges that Gemini made misrepresentations about its business, particularly regarding the viability of its core crypto platform.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Texas Instruments (TXN) After A 48% One Year Surge?
feed.summary: Texas Instruments (TXN) has seen significant stock appreciation, up 48.1% over the past year, prompting questions about its current valuation. Simply Wall St's analysis, using DCF and P/E ratio methods, suggests the stock is currently overvalued, trading above its estimated intrinsic value and fair P/E ratio. However, different narratives exist, with bullish outlooks driven by long-term capital investment and AI integration suggesting potential undervaluation, while bearish views highlight competition and regulatory risks leading to overvaluation.

feed.title: Disney begins 1,000 job cuts this week across the company
feed.summary: The Walt Disney Co. has started a round of layoffs, impacting 1,000 jobs spread across its various divisions including television and movie studios, ESPN, and corporate functions. This cost-cutting measure follows Disney's earlier announcement to consolidate its marketing division and is one of the first major actions taken by new CEO Josh D’Amaro. Other entertainment companies like Sony Pictures Entertainment and Paramount Skydance have also recently announced job cuts.

feed.title: Altria vs. Philip Morris: One Dividend Is a Trap — Here’s Which One to Avoid
feed.summary: This article compares Altria (MO) and Philip Morris International (PM), highlighting Philip Morris's successful transition to smoke-free products while Altria struggles with declining sales and costly failures in its smoke-free endeavors. While Altria offers a higher dividend yield, its shrinking business and limited product optionality make its dividend a potential trap. Philip Morris, despite a lower yield, demonstrates stronger growth credentials, a credible transformation strategy, and better dividend coverage, making it the more promising investment.

feed.title: Disney CEO Josh D’Amaro Confirms Layoffs In Marketing And Brand Group
feed.summary: Disney CEO Josh D’Amaro has confirmed layoffs affecting up to 1,000 employees, primarily within the company's streamlined marketing and brand organization. These cutbacks are part of a broader consolidation effort across studios, television, ESPN, and other corporate functions, though they are less extensive than previous rounds under Bob Iger. D’Amaro communicated the difficult news to employees through a memo, emphasizing the need for agility and resource re-evaluation in the fast-moving entertainment industry, while committing to supporting the impacted individuals.

feed.title: How Pfizer's Oncology Portfolio Is Shaping Up Before Q1 Results
feed.summary: Pfizer's oncology unit is facing mixed trends ahead of its Q1 earnings report on May 5, with strong performances from key drugs like Xtandi, Lorbrena, and oncology biosimilars offsetting declines in Ibrance sales due to generic competition and Medicare Part D redesign. The acquisition of Seagen in 2023 significantly boosted its oncology position with additional antibody-drug conjugates (ADCs). The company is also advancing several candidates in late-stage development and planning new pivotal studies for PF-08634404.

feed.title: Booking Holdings is “best in class”, this investor says
feed.summary: First Avenue Investment Counsel chief investment officer Brian Madden has added Booking Holdings (NASDAQ:BKNG) to his firm’s dividend growers portfolio, calling it a "best-in-class" global online travel agency and a compelling buy. He argues the market is underestimating Booking’s competitive position due to misplaced fears about AI disruption, highlighting its strong financial profile and long history of navigating competitive threats. Madden sees the recent stock weakness as a buying opportunity, reinforcing the company's strong fundamentals and consistent growth.

feed.title: Here’s Why PepsiCo Stock’s FCF is Set to Jump 40%
feed.summary: PepsiCo is undergoing a significant brand and distribution overhaul, including price cuts on core Frito-Lay brands and reformulation of major brands with cleaner ingredients. These strategic moves are expected to boost free cash flow by approximately 40% in 2026 due to factors like the completion of a productivity cycle, reduced capital spending, and the expiration of a nearly $1 billion tax payment. While Wall Street watches for the success of these changes, the company's stock appears undervalued relative to its projected FCF growth and ongoing dividend increases.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin Weighs New PAC 3 MSE Deal And Artemis II Success
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin (NYSE:LMT) recently secured a significant $4.76 billion contract to boost PAC-3 MSE missile production for the U.S. Army through 2030, reinforcing its defense sector involvement. Concurrently, the company successfully completed NASA's Artemis II mission with its Orion spacecraft, validating deep space crewed capabilities. These developments underscore Lockheed Martin's central role in both defense and space, highlighting long-cycle programs important for investors.

feed.title: PG&E Put At Risk By California Governor's Race Shakeup (Rating Downgrade) (NYSE:PCG)
feed.summary: PG&E's stock dropped due to a shakeup in the California gubernatorial race, as front-runner Rep. Eric Swalwell exited. This development leaves Tom Steyer, who advocates breaking up PG&E's monopoly and reducing utility rates, as the leading candidate. The governor's power over utility regulation and costs in California makes this election outcome critical for PG&E, leading to a downgrade from Buy to Hold for PCG due to heightened regulatory risk.

feed.title: FuboTV Inc stock (US35953D1000): Why sports streaming execution is suddenly worth a closer look
feed.summary: This article examines FuboTV Inc's (US35953D1000) position in the live sports streaming market, highlighting its sports-centric strategy amidst rising content costs and intensifying competition. It discusses FuboTV's unique value proposition, subscriber growth, and path to profitability, while also analyzing potential risks and future growth drivers for investors. The article emphasizes that execution on sports depth will be key to FuboTV's success in the evolving streaming landscape.

feed.title: HP Marks a Decade of Additive Manufacturing Innovation by Introducing the New HP MJF 1200 3D Printer at RAPID+TCT
feed.summary: HP is celebrating a decade of additive manufacturing innovation by unveiling the new HP Multi Jet Fusion 1200 3D Printer Solution at RAPID+TCT, designed to make industrial MJF technology more accessible. The company also announced enhancements to its Jet Fusion 5600 series, including a 20% productivity boost and new Dual Tone technology, alongside the general availability of its HP Industrial Filament 3D Printer 600 HT and expanded Metal Jet ecosystem capabilities. These developments aim to lower cost per part, simplify workflows, and enable wider adoption of additive manufacturing from prototyping to full production.

feed.title: T-Mobile and the National Park Foundation Declare America’s First-Ever Do Not Disturb Season
feed.summary: T-Mobile and the National Park Foundation have launched the first-ever "Do Not Disturb Season" to encourage Americans to disconnect from daily distractions and explore national parks. T-Mobile is committing up to $1 million to the National Park Foundation and offering a chance to win a national parks adventure. The initiative aims to highlight T-Mobile's network coverage, including satellite-enhanced connectivity, enabling peace of mind even in remote areas.

feed.title: Suelopetrol has not been notified of Chevron's expansion at Venezuela joint venture, company says
feed.summary: Venezuelan oil producer Suelopetrol states it has not been informed of any decision or shareholder meeting regarding Chevron's planned increase of its stake to 49% in their joint venture. Suelopetrol, which currently holds a 1% share with potential to expand, asserts its right to a full account of the share transfer and current shareholding disclosure in the Orinoco Belt project.

feed.title: Tuesday Health Partners with Humana on Palliative Care
feed.summary: Tuesday Health is partnering with Humana Inc. to expand access to value-based palliative care for Humana members in Texas. Beginning June 1, the program will offer coordinated clinical guidance, proactive symptom management, and ongoing support to improve the quality of life for Texans living with serious illnesses. This initiative aims to provide whole-person support that complements curative treatments, ensuring care aligns with individual patient needs.

feed.title: Exxon Mobil Corp. stock (US30231G1022): Is energy transition strategy strong enough to unlock new upside?
feed.summary: Exxon Mobil Corp. operates an integrated business model spanning exploration, refining, and chemicals, providing resilience against volatile energy prices and supporting reliable dividends for investors. The company's strategy involves balancing its dominant position in crude oil and natural gas with emerging low-carbon ventures like carbon capture and hydrogen. Despite market pressures and risks from commodity prices and climate policies, analysts view Exxon favorably for long-term holders due to its scale, cost structure, and strong balance sheet, which positions it to navigate the energy transition.

feed.title: BofA Securities Adjusts Chubb Price Target to $271 From $286, Maintains Underperform Rating
feed.summary: BofA Securities has lowered its price target for Chubb (CB) from $286 to $271, while reiterating an Underperform rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a moderated outlook for the insurance company. The article also lists other analyst adjustments for Chubb around the same period, indicating active re-evaluations within the financial sector.

feed.title: Amazon stock rises as Financial Planning Navigators CORP acquires new stake
feed.summary: Amazon (AMZN) stock rose 3.01% to $247.03, showing strong bullish momentum across all moving averages, further supported by Financial Planning Navigators CORP acquiring a new stake of 3,506 shares. Despite overbought signals indicating potential short-term overheating, analysts predict a high probability of continued price increase within the $238-$252 range, with an upcoming earnings report on April 30, 2026.

feed.title: ONEOK Inc. stock (US6826801036): Is its midstream dominance strong enough to unlock new upside?
feed.summary: ONEOK Inc. is a key player in the U.S. energy infrastructure, focusing on natural gas liquids and pipelines, which provides stable cash flows and growth potential for investors. The company's business model relies on long-term, fee-based contracts, shielding it from commodity price volatility and supporting consistent dividends. Despite competition and potential regulatory challenges, ONEOK's strategic assets and strong market position in NGL transportation aim to deliver sustained performance.

feed.title: Boeing jet deliveries slow in March due to 737 MAX wiring issue
feed.summary: Boeing delivered 46 jets in March, a decrease from 51 in February, primarily due to repairs on damaged wiring in about 25 of its 737 MAX planes. While 10 of these 737 deliveries are expected to be pushed into the second quarter, Boeing does not anticipate an overall impact on 737 deliveries for the year. The company's March deliveries lagged behind European rival Airbus, but Boeing led Airbus in the first quarter with 143 deliveries compared to 114.

feed.title: Insider Decision: Robert E Coletti Exercises Options At Cintas For $1.87M
feed.summary: Robert E Coletti, a Board Member at Cintas, exercised stock options worth $1.87 million for 12,544 shares on April 13, as reported in a recent SEC filing. Cintas (NASDAQ: CTAS) shares saw a slight increase of 0.13% to $175.95, valuing Coletti's shares at $1,867,653. The article also provides a financial overview of Cintas, highlighting strong revenue growth, high gross margin, and above-average EPS, while noting challenges in debt management and mixed valuation metrics.

feed.title: EVP Of Micron Technology Sold $1.43M In Stock
feed.summary: MICHAEL CORDANO, EVP at Micron Technology, sold 3,407 shares of the company stock for a total of $1,433,699, as disclosed in an SEC filing. This transaction occurred while Micron Technology shares were up 2.15% at $435.72. The report also highlights Micron Technology's strong financial performance, including significant revenue growth and prudent debt management.

feed.title: Dow Up 284 Points On Gains In Amazon.Com Inc., NVIDIA Corp. Shares
feed.summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average rose by 284 points, driven by significant gains in shares of Amazon.Com Inc. and NVIDIA Corp. This performance reflects positive movement in major technology stocks influencing the broader market index.

feed.title: Rep. Thomas Kean Has Sold Up to $195K Worth Of Chubb Stock: Here's What You Should Know
feed.summary: Representative Thomas Kean of New Jersey recently sold Chubb (NYSE: CB) stock valued between $48,006 and $195,000, with the transaction occurring on March 26, 2026. This sale is part of his 134 stock trades over the past three years. Congressional transactions, governed by the STOCK Act, provide insights into potential market expectations, although they should not be the sole basis for investment decisions.

feed.title: Boeing shipped 114 737s in Q1 as commercial deliveries hit 143
feed.summary: Boeing announced its first-quarter 2026 delivery figures, totaling 143 commercial airplanes and 30 defense units. Notably, 114 of the commercial deliveries were 737 models. The company emphasized that these figures are preliminary and subject to final confirmation with their upcoming quarterly financial results.

feed.title: Boeing Beats Airbus in Deliveries to Further ‘Comeback Story’
feed.summary: Boeing delivered 143 jets in the first quarter of 2026, surpassing its European rival Airbus, which delivered 114 jets. This marks a 10% increase in deliveries for Boeing compared to the previous year, contributing to what is being described as the company's comeback story. The deliveries included 114 737s, 15 787 Dreamliners, eight 777s, and six 767s.
